nodes.label: Flight Price AI Agent
nodes.rationale: 24/7 personal agent that monitors flight prices and alerts via Telegram ONLY when a price is at its historical cheapest AND ML forecasts prices will rise.

nodes.label: Oracle VPS
nodes.rationale: Must survive VPS restart without data loss; Oracle VPS is free.

nodes.label: Claude Sonnet 4.6
nodes.rationale: ONLY for reasoning decisions (~4 calls/day) to stay within â‚¹0 budget.

nodes.label: Gemini 2.5 Flash
nodes.rationale: Used for everything else (parsing, formatting) to stay within â‚¹0 budget.
